mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PURCHASER_PROFILE ( purchaser_profile_no, user_login_no, nickname, phone_number ) VALUES ( #{purchaserProfileNo}, #{userLoginNo}, #{nickname}, #{phoneNumber} )
mapper.select: SELECT pr.purchaser_profile_no, pr.user_login_no, pr.nickname, pr.phone_number FROM PURCHASER_PROFILE pr WHERE pr.user_login_no = #{userLoginNo}
